summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Ticket Dashboard V2 redesign at /admin/service-requests. All backend API tests passed (13/13). Frontend UI verification successful - two-section layout ('To Be Assigned' and 'Assigned Tickets'), stats cards, stage filter pills, and navigation all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ticketing/stats returns 'unassigned' count
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/stats returns 'by_stage' breakdown
Backend: Stats response has all required fields (total, open, closed, unassigned, by_priority, by_topic, by_stage)
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/tickets?assigned=false returns only unassigned tickets
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/tickets?assigned=true returns only assigned tickets
Backend: Pagination works for assigned tickets
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/tickets?status=New filters by stage
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/tickets?status=Assigned filters by stage
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/tickets?status='In Progress' filters by stage
Backend: Combined assigned + status filter works
Backend: Search filter works
Backend: Unassigned count matches actual unassigned tickets
Backend: Stage counts match filtered ticket counts
Frontend: Page loads with data-testid='tickets-page'
Frontend: Stats cards visible - Unassigned (11), Open (17), Closed (0), Total (17)
Frontend: Stage filter pills visible with counts - New (10), Assigned (2), In Progress (1), etc.
Frontend: 'To Be Assigned' section with 11 tickets (unassigned)
Frontend: 'Assigned Tickets' section with 6 tickets (assigned to engineers)
Frontend: Search input present with data-testid='search-tickets'
Frontend: 'Refresh' button present
Frontend: 'New Ticket' button present
Frontend: Stage filter click filters Assigned Tickets section only
Frontend: Stage filter shows 'Filtered: {stage}' indicator with clear button
Frontend: Empty state shows 'No assigned tickets with stage {stage}' when filtered
Frontend: Clicking ticket row navigates to /admin/service-requests/{id}

sections.name: To Be Assigned
sections.description: Shows tickets where assigned_to_name is null (team may be assigned)

stage_filter_pills.description: Filters only the Assigned Tickets section, not To Be Assigned

search_input.description: Filters both sections by ticket number or subject

buttons.name: New Ticket
buttons.works: button works but modal has bug

pagination.description: Assigned Tickets section supports pagination (not visible with only 6 tickets)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard V2 redesign tested and working. Two sections: 'To Be Assigned' (11 tickets, team assigned but no engineer) and 'Assigned Tickets' (6 tickets with engineer names). Stage filter pills filter only Assigned section. CreateTicketModal ChevronDown import bug was fixed during testing. Stats endpoint returns unassigned count and by_stage breakdown correctly.
